name: SOLON Energy GmbH
summary: SOLON Energy GmbH engages in the manufacture and sale of solar power modules and solar systems for rooftop, roof integrated, and greenfield installations worldwide. It is involved in the development, construction, and maintenance of commercial and utility-scale solar systems, as well as distribution to project developers. The company offers polycrystalline and monocrystalline solar modules with various outputs and turnkey power plant solutions to residential buildings, commercial rooftops, and power plant greenfields. It also engages in the organization and realization of solar power plant projects to utilities, financial investors, and industrial customers. The company was formerly known as SOLON SE and changed its name to SOLON Energy GmbH in March 2012. SOLON Energy GmbH was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Berlin, Germany.
